title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Schneider Electric India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Schneider Electric India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Schneider Electric India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Mumbai-based team.

About Schneider Electric India:
Schneider Electric India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Schneider Electric India!
